ideas.title: LaSt-ViT CLS replacement
ideas.source_ref: Code comment claims LaSt-ViT / Vision Transformers Need More Than Registers. Exact paper and official code are not verified yet.

v1.rationale: May improve fine-grained CLS representation, but v1 depends on CLIP-space alignment and this path can perturb base logits.

ideas.hypothesis: Replacing or blending CLIP CLS with a part-aware patch pooled CLS may improve fine-grained bird recognition if the pooled feature remains aligned with CLIP text space.
ideas.implementation_scope: Evaluate use_lastvit_cls and lastvit residual/projection path without changing the v1 patch-selection baseline.
ideas.risk: High risk of CLIP text-vision misalignment and seen-favoring shortcut.
ideas.compatibility: Must keep config-off path exactly equal to v1.
ideas.transfer_notes: May transfer to later versions if they still use CLIP CLS or base logits.
evidence: Implementation exists in model/MyModel.py but is not active in v1.
Source needs paper/source-code verification before trial.
ideas.next_action: Verify the cited paper/source, then decide whether to create a small module trial.

ideas.title: Dynamic local branch gating and pooling
ideas.source_ref: Source unclear. Migrated from inactive code switches.

v1.rationale: v1 uses fixed add scoring; dynamic gating may help hard samples but changes attribution and can overfit seen classes.
blockers: Split dynamic gate, branch weight, and pooling into separate trials

ideas.hypothesis: Input-dependent gating may reduce harmful local branch influence on easy samples while keeping local evidence for hard samples.
ideas.implementation_scope: Test dynamic outer gate, dynamic s2v/v2s branch weight, and DMP pooling as separate controlled switches.
ideas.risk: Can overfit seen classes or make results hard to attribute if multiple gates change together.
ideas.compatibility: Each sub-switch must be tested independently and default off.
ideas.transfer_notes: Reusable in any later version that keeps base_logits plus local_score composition.
evidence: Config switches exist: gating_dynamic=fixed, weight_s2v_mode=fixed, pool_method=mean, pool_dynamic=fixed.
Implementation exists but v1 uses fixed add scoring.
ideas.next_action: Split into one-variable trials only after source or rationale is documented.

ideas.title: Cosine-only CrossModal scoring with anchor losses
ideas.source_ref: Source unclear. Migrated from inactive cosine_only path.

v1.rationale: This changes the main scoring path from additive correction to CrossModal-only cosine scoring, so it is risky for v1.

ideas.target_component: model/MyModel.py: score_mode=cosine_only and related anchor/distill/aux losses
ideas.hypothesis: Letting CrossModal enhanced visual and text features directly produce logits may outperform additive correction if anchor losses prevent CLIP-space drift.
ideas.implementation_scope: Evaluate score_mode=cosine_only together with only the minimum required anchor loss, then add distill or auxiliary losses separately.
ideas.risk: High risk of destroying CLIP zero-shot geometry and hurting unseen classes.
ideas.transfer_notes: May become more suitable for a future version that intentionally replaces additive scoring.
evidence: Config contains score_mode=add, lambda_v_anchor=0, lambda_t_unseen_anchor=0, lambda_distill=0, lambda_aux_s2v=0, lambda_aux_v2s=0.
Implementation path exists but is inactive in v1.
ideas.next_action: Require source/rationale review before any trial because this changes the main scoring path.

ideas.title: AG-JEPA neighbor-text variant
ideas.source_ref: Source unclear. Migrated from inactive use_ag_jepa_v2 switch.

v1.rationale: v1 already uses AG-JEPA; this is a local extension of the active auxiliary loss.
blockers: Document source or mark as local heuristic
Check whether neighbor classes blur fine-grained birds

ideas.hypothesis: Adding nearby class text as a neighbor constraint may make AG-JEPA patch prediction less class-isolated and improve semantic smoothness.

expected_effect.U: possibly improve if neighbor semantics transfer

ideas.implementation_scope: Test use_ag_jepa_v2 with fixed neighbor_topk and neighbor_weight while keeping base AG-JEPA enabled.
ideas.risk: May blur fine-grained classes and reduce seen discrimination.
ideas.compatibility: Only valid on top of v1 AG-JEPA; off path is current v1.
ideas.transfer_notes: Transfers to versions that keep AG-JEPA.
evidence: Implementation exists in _ag_jepa_loss but is inactive in v1.
ideas.next_action: Document whether this is a local variant or paper-backed before trial.

ideas.title: Counterfactual negative text margin
ideas.source_ref: Source unclear. Migrated from inactive use_cf_neg_text switch.

v1.rationale: v1 relies on GPT text prototypes; text-neighbor negatives can be tested as an auxiliary margin without changing logits shape.

ideas.hypothesis: Mining text-neighbor negative classes and enforcing a margin may reduce confusion between semantically similar seen classes.
ideas.implementation_scope: Test use_cf_neg_text with one small lambda and fixed top-k against v1.
ideas.risk: Could over-separate seen text neighborhoods and hurt unseen transfer.
ideas.compatibility: Default off; must not change text embeddings or base logits when disabled.
ideas.transfer_notes: Transfers to versions that keep class text prototypes.
evidence: Loss implementation exists but is inactive in v1.
ideas.next_action: Record a reference source or mark as local heuristic before trial.

ideas.title: Geometry-aware attribute routing
ideas.source_ref: Source unclear. Migrated from inactive use_geo_attr_routing switch.

v1.rationale: v1 already passes class attributes and CLIP attribute text; routing can be added as an auxiliary loss.
blockers: Find source support or mark local heuristic

ideas.hypothesis: Routing local visual features to class-relevant attribute text may improve explainable part-attribute grounding.
ideas.implementation_scope: Use class attributes and attribute text embeddings to add an auxiliary routing loss.
ideas.risk: Attribute supervision may not align with CLIP patch space and may overfit CUB attributes.
ideas.compatibility: Requires class_attr and attr_text_embeds; default off path is current v1.
ideas.transfer_notes: Transfers to versions that preserve attribute tensors; may not transfer to datasets without attributes.
evidence: Implementation checks required attribute tensors but is inactive in v1.
ideas.next_action: Find paper/source support for attribute routing or mark as local idea before trial.

ideas.title: Topology-aware text attribute reservoir
ideas.source_ref: Source unclear. Migrated from inactive use_text_attr_reservoir switch.

v1.rationale: Could enrich text prototypes, but v1 depends on stable GPT/CLIP text geometry and topology loss.

ideas.hypothesis: Injecting attribute-text reservoir information into class prototypes may enrich class semantics while topology loss limits drift.
ideas.implementation_scope: Enable text_attr_reservoir with zero-init projection and test one small ratio.
ideas.risk: May distort GPT/CLIP text prototype geometry or leak noisy attribute emphasis.
ideas.compatibility: Requires class_attr and attr_text_embeds; default off path is current v1.
ideas.transfer_notes: Transfers to text-prototype versions with attribute support.
evidence: Projection module exists but is inactive in v1.
ideas.next_action: Clarify source and decide if this should be tested before attribute routing.

ideas.title: Attribute-patch OT alignment
ideas.source_ref: Uses optimal-transport style Sinkhorn matching, but the exact GTPJ module source is not verified.

v1.rationale: v1 has FAE patches and attribute text inputs, so OT alignment can be tested as an auxiliary loss.

ideas.hypothesis: Soft OT alignment between local patches and class-relevant attributes may improve fine-grained part grounding.
ideas.implementation_scope: Enable attr_patch_ot with fixed top-k, temperature, and Sinkhorn iterations.
ideas.risk: Extra alignment loss can be unstable and may force incorrect patch-attribute matches.
ideas.compatibility: Requires class_attr and attr_text_embeds; default off path is current v1.
ideas.transfer_notes: Transfers only to versions with patch tokens and attribute text.
evidence: Sinkhorn-style loss implementation exists but is inactive in v1.
General OT concept exists, but exact module source is not recorded.
ideas.next_action: Verify OT/patch-attribute grounding source before trial.

ideas.title: Uncertainty-aware MSDN gate
ideas.source_ref: Source unclear. Migrated from inactive use_uncertainty_msdn_gate switch.

v1.rationale: v1 actively uses MSDN; uncertainty gating can modify only that auxiliary loss while keeping logits shape unchanged.
blockers: Document confidence-gating source or local rationale
Check whether gating weakens active distillation

ideas.hypothesis: Reducing mutual distillation weight when branches are uncertain or disagree may prevent wrong consensus from being reinforced.
ideas.implementation_scope: Enable uncertainty gate only, keeping lambda_msdn and msdn_temp equal to v1.
ideas.risk: May weaken an active v1 loss and reduce the benefit of branch distillation.
ideas.compatibility: Only meaningful when lambda_msdn > 0; default off path is current v1.
ideas.transfer_notes: Transfers to any version with two-branch distillation.
evidence: Gate implementation exists inside the MSDN loss but is inactive in v1.
ideas.next_action: Document whether this is local confidence gating or paper-backed before trial.

ideas.title: Seen-unseen calibration losses
ideas.source_ref: Source unclear. Migrated from inactive calibration and bias-margin losses.

v1.rationale: Calibration can improve U but may reduce S; v1 should first confirm baseline before calibration trials.
blockers: Define decision rule based on H, not only U

ideas.hypothesis: Explicit seen-unseen calibration may reduce seen-class bias in generalized zero-shot evaluation.
ideas.implementation_scope: Test lambda_cal and lambda_bias separately, never together in the first trial.
ideas.risk: Can artificially trade seen accuracy for unseen accuracy without improving harmonic mean.
ideas.compatibility: Default off path is current v1.
ideas.transfer_notes: Potentially reusable across GZSL versions but must be scored after each baseline is known.
evidence: Both losses are implemented but inactive in v1.
ideas.next_action: Find a GZSL calibration reference before selecting this as a trial.
